chunks.title: Reign of Abijam
chunks.reason: Complete narrative covering the accession, reign, and death of King Abijam of Judah.

chunks.title: Reign of Asa
chunks.reason: Comprehensive account of King Asa's reforms, wars with Baasha, and death.

chunks.title: Reigns of Nadab and Baasha
chunks.reason: Narrative detailing the brief reign of Nadab and the rise of Baasha over Israel.
